# Implement Groups CRUD & Timetables

Support group (class) creation, schedules/timetables, and enrollment management.

## Tasks

- Define `Group` model with schedule slots, capacity, instructor, and center reference.
- Add CRUD API/GraphQL resolvers for groups.
- Implement timetable UI and schedule-picker components.
- Add enrollment endpoints and capacity checks.

## Rationale

Grouping and timetables are required for managing recurring activities and student enrollment.

Suggested labels: backend, frontend
